---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new workflow
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What photo management task should this make easier?

## Proposed workflow

Describe how the feature should work from the user's point of view.

## Safety concerns

Could this feature copy, rename, move, delete, or overwrite files?

## Alternatives

Is there a simpler version that would still be useful?
